content.en:
The Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation taken by Ye Tian is also the first Supreme Fruit of Reincarnation that has been taken away at present.

Every Reincarnation Supreme Fruit is not easy to be taken away, and it even needs to sacrifice the Origin Upper Realm Overlord before there is any hope of taking it.

This is the first time that the Supreme Fruit of Samsara has been taken so easily.

At this time, Rin Mo was shocked.

"This strength ......"

He couldn't believe it!

In terms of cultivation, Ao Chen is only three bloodline awakenings, even if he can fight beyond the level, it is comparable to the top four bloodline awakenings.

He also guessed that Ao Chen had awakened the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, otherwise he would not have been so valued by the high-level, but even if he added the reincarnation supreme supernatural power, he only had the attack power of five bloodline awakenings.

But the reincarnation supreme magic power can't be used a few times, and it can't fight for a long time!

The overlords of the Origin Upper Realm here are all in the Five Awakening Realms, which one will be weaker than Ao Chen.

As a result, the other Origin Upper Realm overlords trembled and joined forces to form a battle formation, so that they could hope to save their lives.

As for Ao Chen, he killed it directly, easily took away a reincarnation supreme fruit, and it was impossible to do it without the strength of the top six awakening origin and upper realm overlords!

The cultivation of three awakenings, the combat power of six awakenings, this is too exaggerated!

......

"One Reincarnation Supreme Fruit is not enough!"

Ye Tian rushed towards the second Reincarnation Supreme Fruit again.

The reincarnation ancestral tree's life-saving means are powerful, but the attack power is only six awakenings to the Origin Upper Realm Overlord level, and it can't stop Ye Tian at all.

Soon.

He took the second Supreme Fruit of Samsara again.

The third one!

The fourth!

The fifth!

One by one, the Supreme Fruits of Reincarnation fell into Ye Tian's hands, which made those Reincarnation Origin Clans angry.

Especially Jiuyuan, he still wanted to win all the reincarnation supreme fruits, but now he didn't even win a single reincarnation supreme fruit.

"Cooperate with me to form a battle formation!!!!"

Jiuyuan yelled.

Rumble!!!!!

A Zun Origin Origin Upper Realm Overlord cooperated with Jiuyuan to form a battle array, turning into an incomparably terrifying reincarnation source clan giant, and a terrifying reincarnation supreme treasure sword emerged, which was also the weapon of Jiuyuan, which was given to him by the high-level of the reincarnation source clan.

The Reincarnation Source Clan is very good at refining weapons, and the number of reincarnation treasures they possess is even greater than that of the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan.

As the peerless genius of the reincarnation source clan, Jiuyuan naturally has the treasure of reincarnation.

At this time.

Jiu Yuan also inspired a secret treasure of the reincarnation treasure level, increased his combat power, and killed Ye Tian.

He just wanted to kill Ye Tian now.

As for whether you can kill it, you won't know until you fight!

......

"Reincarnation Supreme Divine Power - Tianyuan Town Boundary Sword !!!!"

A terrifying sword light seemed to tear apart this piece of void world, and even the reincarnation ancestral tree was a little afraid of such an attack, and countless branches were densely superimposed, forming an indestructible defense to block the impact of the sword light.

But this sword light was aimed at Ye Tian, wanting to take the opportunity to severely damage and even kill Ye Tian.

"Aochen be careful!"

Rin Mo and they preached.

And Ye Tian didn't care at all, such an attack might have reached the limit of breaking the Origin Boundary Origin Upper Realm Overlord six times, but it still couldn't reach the level of breaking the Origin Boundary Origin Upper Realm Overlord seven times.

For Ye Tian, such an attack was useless.

Of course.

It would be an exaggeration for him to not be able to show his full strength either.

Therefore, he activated the reincarnation treasure of the reincarnation golden glass leaf and formed a light shield to protect himself, so that the other Origin Upper Realm overlords only thought that he blocked it with the help of the reincarnation treasure, and would not doubt his strength.

Airplanes!!!!!

The reincarnation supreme divine power attack like the Tianyuan Town Boundary Sword formed a terrifying impact on the reincarnation golden glass leaf, but it did not break the defense.

And at this time.

Ye Tian used the supreme divine power of reincarnation, the spear of the ruins of the sky, and also cooperated with the reincarnation supreme treasure spear to directly hit the nine abysses and them.

Although Ye Tian hid a lot of strength and only showed the combat power of the six awakening limits, this shot was not so easy to catch.

Rumble!!!!

The giant was directly knocked out, and the terrifying concussive force caused a group of members of the Reincarnation Source Clan to be severely damaged, and even Jiu Yuan was injured.

Seeing this scene, Rin Mo also knew that it was a good time.

"Attack them!"

Rin Mo shouted, and a group of reincarnation celestial clans killed them in the reincarnation source clan.

And Ye Tian also suppressed his strength, no matter how he fought, he would not exert the strength of the seven awakenings.

Soon.

There was a fall of the reincarnation source clan, and Ye Tian was even more ruthless, killing one reincarnation source clan after another in an instant.

He didn't care about the consequences, even if he killed all the members of the Reincarnation Source Clan here, the Reincarnation Heavenly Clan would definitely keep him.

As for whether a war will break out between the Reincarnation Celestial Clan and the Reincarnation Source Clan, he won't care, after all, he is not the real Reincarnation Celestial Clan.

"Run!"

Jiuyuan shouted.

He knew that if he didn't escape, the reincarnation source clan would suffer heavy losses.

Whoa!!!

One by one, the members of the Reincarnation Source Clan scattered and fled.

And Jiu Yuan was very interesting, and directly and desperately intercepted Ye Tian to hunt down and kill other members of the Reincarnation Source Clan.

Jiuyuan's strength was only the Origin Upper Realm Overlord combat power that broke the boundary of the six origins, but after all, his whole body was full of treasures, and there were several reincarnation treasures, and there were also life-saving things like the reincarnation golden glass leaf.

Arguably.

Even if it was the attack of the Overlord of the Awakening Origin Upper Realm seven times, don't even think about killing the Nine Abysses in a short period of time.

If Ye Tian bursts out with all his combat strength, he will still be able to kill Jiuyuan, but it will take a little time.

However, there is no need to do this, it is not good for him to expose his full strength.

Thereupon.

After attacking for a while, he watched Jiu Yuan flee.

That's when it happened.

The Reincarnation Ancestral Tree seized the opportunity, broke the blockade, and fled from here.

"Lord Aochen, the reincarnation ancestral tree has escaped!"

A member of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan reported.

At this moment, the other party's eyes are full of worship!

"I'll chase it!"

Ye Tian went to hunt down the reincarnation ancestral tree.

His speed was fast, hanging the other members of the Reincarnation Celestial Clan far behind.

......

It didn't take long.

Ye Tian chased after the Reincarnation Ancestral Tree.

Then.

The Reincarnation Ancestral Tree only needed to face Ye Tian's opponent, and it urged all the branches to attack Ye Tian, and even countless branches converged together to form a drill, exerting an incomparably terrifying attack power.

This is also the attack power of the limit of the six awakenings.

The reincarnation ancestor felt that if he only needed to deal with Ye Tian alone, he still didn't need to worry about anything, he could not be afraid of Ye Tian at all, and he might even hurt Ye Tian.

But the next second, it was dumbfounded.

"Shattered!"

Ye Tian held the Reincarnation Arcana in his hand and showed an even more terrifying attack, directly shattering its countless branch drill bits.
